concerns.text: Success Criterion SC‑001 (interaction p‑value < 0.05) is not explicitly referenced or linked to any plan element; the plan should annotate which step validates this criterion (e.g., model fitting in `src/analysis/models.py`).
Success Criterion SC‑002 (partial η² ≥ 0.02) lacks an explicit mapping in the plan; add a note linking it to the output of the ANCOVA models (FR‑006).
Success Criterion SC‑003 (bootstrap CI excludes zero and overlaps parametric CI) is not mentioned in the plan; include a reference to the bootstrap step (`src/analysis/bootstrap.py`, FR‑008).
Success Criterion SC‑004 (simple‑slope plots generated for all outcomes) is absent from the plan’s traceability; associate it with the visualization module (`src/viz/simple_slopes.py`, FR‑007).
Success Criterion SC‑005 (renderable HTML report) is not explicitly covered; add a link to the reporting step (`src/report/generate_html.py`, FR‑010).
